title: Synthesist
current_task: Agent memory storage architecture — compare flat JSON vs SQLite tradeoffs for storing agent state, context, and episodic memory. Consider: query patterns, concurrency, schema evolution, debugging ease, data size scaling, and what kind of memory (short-term working vs long-term episodic).
